footer.licNo: MEA Govt of India License No
footer.address: Rama Tower, Ring Road, Sector-10, Dwarka, New Delhi
footer.newsletterSub: Subscribe to our daily mobilization alerts.
footer.descText: RAMA INTERNATIONAL-INDIA is a leading international recruitment and manpower consultancy approved by the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), Government of India. We provide end-to-end recruitment, sourcing, visa assistance, and workforce deployment solutions for employers across the GCC, Europe, Africa, and other international markets.
footer.licNoDesc: Registered under License: RC-B-0850/DEL/COM/1000+/5/9385/2018 with the Ministry of External Affairs, India. Fully certified for global deployment.
footer.isoDesc: Internationally certified operational frameworks for high-quality vocational screening and recruitment solutions.
footer.dossierDesc: All candidates' biometric data and certification logs are encrypted and verified securely. Providing data safety you can trust.

hero.title: From Interview to Visa: Your Complete Global Recruitment Partner
hero.desc: Bridging world-class Indian technicians, healthcare practitioners, and corporate leaders with certified global campaigns across GCC, Europe, and Asia.

vision.title: Managing Director's Vision
vision.quote: Connecting lives, building nations. RAMA is a bridge between ambition and execution. We are committed to transparency, compliance, and speed.
vision.licText: Vetted and authorized for unlimited worldwide recruitment deployment.
vision.mandate1Desc: Attesting degree and trade records through official Ministry of External Affairs portals.
vision.mandate2Desc: Partnering with regional VFS centers for seamless finger-scan logging and medical clearances.
vision.mandate3Desc: Rigorous practical skills testing inside our certified New Delhi (Dwarka) and Mumbai yards.
vision.strategicDesc: We engineer trust, compliance, and efficiency at every step of global workforce deployments.

whyChoose.title: Why Global Enterprises Partner With RAMA
whyChoose.complianceDesc: All sourcing campaigns fully validated under Ministry of External Affairs protocols.
whyChoose.testingDesc: Candidates physically vetted at accredited industrial testing rigs.
whyChoose.consulateDesc: Direct consulate liaison desks in New Delhi & Mumbai for rapid visa stamping.

process.title: Hiring Mobilization Blueprint

process.step2Desc: Accredited trade test grading and interview board selection.

process.roadmapDesc: From candidate sourcing to the final flight mobilization.

testimonials.title: Partner Endorsements
testimonials.subtitle: Global Feedback
testimonials.desc: See what our international corporate clients say about our vetting yards and visa turnaround.
testimonials.t1Quote: RAMA INTERNATIONAL-INDIA is our absolute go-to partner. Their trade testing is incredibly rigorous, and they managed the visa stamping of 150 HVAC technicians in record time.
testimonials.t2Quote: Sourcing nurses who meet German language requirements was a massive challenge until we partnered with RAMA. Deepak Chauhan's team handled the MEA certifications and logistics flawlessly.
testimonials.t3Quote: We mobilized over 100 heavy vehicle drivers in a single campaign. The candidates arrived fully briefed, trade-tested, and with completed biometric clearances. Highly professional.

faqs.title: Campaign FAQs
faqs.faq1Q: What is RAMA INTERNATIONAL-INDIA's licensing status in India?
faqs.faq1A: We are fully authorized and licensed by the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), Government of India (Lic No: RC-B-0850/DEL/COM/1000+/5/9385/2018). This status permits us to recruit unlimited manpower globally.
faqs.faq2Q: Where are your trade testing and training centers located?
faqs.faq2A: Our state-of-the-art trade testing yards are located in New Delhi (Dwarka) and Mumbai. These centers feature full setups for practical welding (6G), industrial electrical panels, HVAC rigging, plumbing, and civil construction mockups.
faqs.faq3Q: What is your standard turnaround time for GCC mobilization?
faqs.faq3A: Typically, the timeline from selection to flight departure takes 25 to 40 days. This duration includes medical diagnostics, biometric registrations, degree attestation by embassy portals, and visa stamping.
faqs.faq4Q: How do you verify the technical skills of candidates?
faqs.faq4A: Every candidate undergoes strict practical screening guided by international standards. We perform rigorous trade tests and maintain detailed grading records, which are shared with clients prior to official select signatures.

industries.healthcareIntro: Connecting world-class Indian healthcare professionals with leading medical groups.
industries.healthcareDesc: Our healthcare recruitment desk is trusted by premier hospital groups and clinics. We specialize in sourcing and mobilizing highly qualified medical practitioners who meet local health authority guidelines and language requirements.
industries.healthcareRoles: Doctors, Nurses, Lab Technicians, Pharmacists, Radiographers, Caregivers, Physiotherapists
industries.healthcareSkills: Clinical Patient Care, Electronic Health Records (EHR), Medical Equipment Operation, Patient Empathy, Emergency Response Protocol
industries.healthcareBenefits: Tax-free Salary, Shared Bachelor/Family Accommodation, Health Insurance, Annual Paid Leave with Air Tickets
industries.healthcareProcess: Document Verification, Initial Sourcing, Client Panel Interview, Dataflow Verification / VFS Biometrics, Flight Mobilization
industries.constructionIntro: Mobilizing skilled engineering and technical cohorts for civil and structural infrastructure projects.
industries.constructionDesc: From high-rise commercial structures to complex municipal infrastructure, our construction division delivers certified engineers, operators, and tradespeople who undergo rigid trade testing.
industries.constructionRoles: Civil Engineers, Site Engineers, Architects, Surveyors, Electricians, Plumbers, Welders, Masons
industries.constructionSkills: Blueprint Reading, CAD Design, Safety Protocol Compliance (OSHA), Tool & Equipment Operation, Quality Control Vetting
industries.constructionBenefits: Standard Accommodation, Site Transportation, Medical Coverage, Overtime Allowances
industries.constructionProcess: CV Screening, Practical Trade Vetting, Client Interview Board, Visa Endorsement, Flight Booking
industries.oilGasIntro: Providing certified technicians and engineers for refinery, pipeline, and drilling installations.
industries.oilGasDesc: The energy sector demands zero-defect execution. Our oil & gas desk matches API-standard welding, mechanical, and safety inspectors with major oil field groups.
industries.oilGasRoles: Mechanical Engineers, Electrical Engineers, Instrumentation Engineers, Drilling Engineers, Safety Officers, Pipeline Technicians
industries.oilGasSkills: API Welding (6G/TIG), Pipeline Maintenance, HSE Safety Standards, Instrumentation Calibration, High-pressure System Testing
industries.oilGasBenefits: Competitive Day Rates, On-site Food & Housing, Premium Medical Coverage, Round-trip Flight Tickets
industries.oilGasProcess: HSE Vetting, Client Interview Panel, GAMCA Medical Screening, Visa Endorsement, Pre-departure Safety Induction
industries.hospitalityIntro: Sourcing service-oriented professionals for luxury hotel chains, resorts, and F&B brands.
industries.hospitalityDesc: Indian hospitality practitioners are highly regarded for service excellence. We source personnel for fine dining, resorts, and corporate culinary groups.
industries.hospitalityRoles: Hotel Managers, Chefs, Waiters, Housekeeping Staff, Receptionists, Kitchen Helpers
industries.hospitalitySkills: Customer Relations, Culinary Arts, Multi-lingual Communication, Event Coordination, Hygiene & Sanitation Vetting
industries.hospitalityBenefits: Duty Meals, Shared Housing, Uniform Provided, Medical Insurance, Tips & Service Charge Shares
industries.hospitalityProcess: Video Profile Review, Practical Culinary / Service Demonstration, Visa Clearance, Onboarding Briefing
industries.logisticsIntro: Mobilizing fleet operators, dispatch coordinators, and warehousing professionals globally.
industries.logisticsDesc: Efficient logistics are the backbone of commerce. We supply heavy vehicle operators, warehouse controllers, and dispatch managers certified in GCC and EU regulations.
industries.logisticsRoles: Drivers, Warehouse Supervisors, Forklift Operators, Fleet Managers, Supply Chain Coordinators
industries.logisticsSkills: Heavy Vehicle Operation, Inventory Control Systems, Route Planning, Supply Chain Management, Forklift Vetting
industries.logisticsBenefits: Accommodation Allowance, Health Insurance, Overtime Wages, Annual Flight Allowance
industries.logisticsProcess: Driving License Verification, Driving Skill Test, Client Review, Visa Gate Stamping, Flight Departure
industries.manufacturingIntro: Deploying skilled CNC, assembly, and inspection crews to automated manufacturing plants.
industries.manufacturingDesc: Our manufacturing division matches certified operators, machinists, and assembly experts with modern European, Canadian, and GCC manufacturing facilities.
industries.manufacturingRoles: Machine Operators, CNC Operators, Quality Inspectors, Production Supervisors, Assembly Workers
industries.manufacturingSkills: CNC Programming & Operation, Precision Measurement Tools, Blueprint Reading, Assembly Line Coordination, Quality Audit Compliance
industries.manufacturingBenefits: Competitive Hourly Wages, Relocation Relieving Pack, Standard Accommodation, Health Insurance
industries.manufacturingProcess: Technical Assessment, Client Interview panel, Biometric clearance, Visa Stamping, On-site Reporting

about.title: About RAMA INTERNATIONAL-INDIA
about.desc: India's Most Trusted Global Manpower Consultant Since 2018
about.milestoneTitle: Leading the Way in Global Talent Mobilization
about.milestoneDesc1: Founded in 2018 by Deepak Chauhan, RAMA INTERNATIONAL-INDIA was established with a singular mission: to streamline the international recruitment lifecycle and bridge the gap between Indian talent and premier overseas employers.
about.milestoneDesc2: Our unique value proposition lies in our tagline: "From Interview to Visa." Unlike traditional agencies that stop at selection, we coordinate every stage of trade testing, medical checks, biometric indexing, consulate stamping, travel booking, and local onboarding.
about.founderQuote: "Our commitment is to absolute transparency, compliance, and speed. We don't just fill job roles; we empower careers and catalyze development for global contracting leaders."
about.y2018Desc: Established headquarters in New Delhi. Obtained recruitment authorization license from the Ministry of External Affairs.
about.y2020Desc: Built state-of-the-art trade testing yards in Delhi and Mumbai for heavy fabrication, industrial electrical, and HVAC assessments.
about.y2023Desc: Surpassed 5,000 active candidate mobilizations across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Germany, and Singapore.
about.pillar1Desc: Adhering 100% to eMigrate rules, Ministry guidelines, and local destination labor laws.
about.pillar2Desc: Rejecting shortcuts. Every worker undergoes strict practical evaluation before travel submission.
about.pillar3Desc: Conducting pre-departure briefings and housing audits to guarantee fair candidate treatment overseas.

visaTimeline.title: Visa Processing Status
visaTimeline.desc: Track your overseas immigration and mobilization timeline.
visaTimeline.stage1Desc: Recruiter checks passport validity, trade credentials, and police clearance certificates (PCC).
visaTimeline.stage2Desc: Documents and medical reports sent to the respective GCC consulate or destination embassy.
visaTimeline.stage3Desc: Consulate issues the official overseas employment stamp in the candidate's passport.
visaTimeline.stage4Desc: Flight tickets booked. Travel itinerary sent and pre-departure briefing completed.
visaTimeline.stage5Desc: Candidate reports to the international employer. Local onboarding initiated.
